Date SKU Product Variant Qty Gross Tax Sq. Fee Location Payment
How this works: Select a date range below to generate your Sales & Use Tax filing numbers. Tax-exempt sales are all honey varieties except Hot Honey. Taxable sales are everything else (candles, skincare, hot honey, tea, gifts, etc.). Tax collected is pulled directly from what Square charged at point of sale.

—

Component Inventory
Track raw materials on hand — packaging components and bulk honey by variety. Log shipments and production batches to keep counts current.
Enter your current counts. Update anytime after a physical count.
Component Unit Cost Qty on Hand Stock Value Last Updated
Total Stock Value —
Unbottled honey on hand by variety, tracked in grams. Deducts automatically when you log a production batch.
Variety Grams on Hand Lbs on Hand Est. 1 lb Jars Est. 2 lb Jars Last Updated
TOTAL — —
Fill weights: .75 lb = 340g · 1 lb = 454g · 1.5 lb = 680g · 2 lb = 907g
Log each shipment as it arrives. Stock on hand and unit cost update automatically.
Date Component Qty Received Total Paid Unit Cost
Log a production run. Components are deducted from stock automatically.

Import Data
Upload fresh exports from Square, your bank, or credit card — no accounting degree required.
🟦

Square Sales Import

  1. Log into Square Dashboard
  2. Go to Reports → Sales → Item Sales
  3. Set your date range, click Export (CSV)
  4. Upload the file below
🏦

Bank / Credit Card

  1. Log into your bank's website
  2. Download transactions as CSV
  3. Upload below — we'll map it to your expense categories
📦

Inventory Count

  1. Count your jars on hand
  2. Export the inventory template or type counts manually on the Inventory tab
Cost Builder
Build a cost-per-bottle scenario for a new or updated product. Pick your honey, set the price you paid, add components, and save it to the Cost Per Bottle tab.
Product Info
🍯 Honey Cost
Yield accounts for honey lost to filling — typically 1.0–1.1× the jar weight.

Settings
App configuration and data management.

Reset All Data

This will wipe every edit, deletion, and imported file and restore the app to the original spreadsheet data. There is no undo. Only use this if something has gone badly wrong.

⚠️ Warning: All your edits, categorizations, and imported bank transactions will be permanently deleted.
